title: Nha Trang, Khanh Hoa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nha Trang, Khanh Hoa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nha Trang is a city in Khanh Hoa with a population of 500,000. Vietnam’s premier beach resort destination with stunning coastline, scuba diving, and a growing expat community, offering tropical living at a fraction of comparable destinations.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
